---
title: "Moderated mediation under measurement and structural misspecification"
author: "Felipe Fontana Vieira and Yves Rosseel"
date: today
format: pdf
---

## Introduction

Placeholder manuscript rendered by the CI pipeline (`.github/workflows/render.yaml`).
Replace this with the article body.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

Simulation results live in `results/`. With the execution directory set to this
file's folder, they can be read with e.g.:

```{r}
#| eval: false
summary_tbl <- readRDS("../results/summary.rds")
```
